auto.name: Auto
auto.prompt_fragment: automatic shot selection based on intent and assets, prioritizing garment readability and identity fidelity
auto.notes: Use when you want the system to choose the most suitable framing.

aerial_drone_wide.name: Aerial drone wide
aerial_drone_wide.prompt_fragment: aerial drone wide establishing shot from high altitude, subject readable with environment context, stable horizon, cinematic scale
aerial_drone_wide.notes: Best for location storytelling and arrivals; ensure subject still readable for ads.

beauty_close_up.name: Beauty close up
beauty_close_up.prompt_fragment: tight beauty close-up, face fills most of the frame, clean background separation, precise skin and makeup detail, stable proportions
beauty_close_up.notes: For makeup, eyewear, jewelry, and portrait-driven luxury.

bird_eye_top_down.name: Bird eye top down
bird_eye_top_down.prompt_fragment: top-down bird’s-eye view, graphic composition, clear edges and spacing, controlled perspective
bird_eye_top_down.notes: Useful for flat-lay adjacent scenes, product layouts, and strong geometry.

close_up.name: Close up
close_up.prompt_fragment: close-up framing with strong subject emphasis, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, clear texture rendering
close_up.notes: Use for accessories, fabric texture, branding on garments, hands, and details.

detail_macro.name: Detail macro
detail_macro.prompt_fragment: macro detail shot focused on a single garment or accessory area, stitching and material micro-texture visible, controlled specular highlights
detail_macro.notes: For material proof and luxury craft cues.

extreme_close_up.name: Extreme close up
extreme_close_up.prompt_fragment: extreme close-up on a single facial or product feature, minimal context, high fidelity micro-detail, stable focus plane
extreme_close_up.notes: For eye makeup, eyewear fit points, logos, zippers, seams.

full_body_wide.name: Full body wide
full_body_wide.prompt_fragment: full-body wide shot, head-to-toe visible with extra negative space, environment present but non-distracting, proportions preserved
full_body_wide.notes: Great for lifestyle and location-based fashion.

full_length.name: Full length
full_length.prompt_fragment: full-length head-to-toe shot, subject centered, silhouette and fit clearly readable, minimal perspective distortion
full_length.notes: Core fashion staple for fit validation and outfit visibility.

high_angle.name: High angle
high_angle.prompt_fragment: high-angle shot looking down slightly, flattering yet realistic proportions, clear outfit readability
high_angle.notes: Use carefully to avoid shortening legs or distorting fit lines.

low_angle_hero.name: Low angle hero
low_angle_hero.prompt_fragment: low-angle hero shot, subject appears powerful, clean vertical lines, controlled distortion, strong presence
low_angle_hero.notes: Best for campaign impact, not strict fit proof.

medium_full.name: Medium full
medium_full.prompt_fragment: medium-full shot from head to mid-calf, clear garment fit and silhouette, balanced perspective, ad-friendly readability
medium_full.notes: A frequent fashion editorial choice when full length is not required.

medium_shot.name: Medium shot
medium_shot.prompt_fragment: medium shot from waist up, clear upper garment fit and accessories, natural perspective, clean separation
medium_shot.notes: Great for tops, jackets, bags, eyewear; keeps identity readable.

overhead.name: Overhead
overhead.prompt_fragment: overhead shot from above, structured composition, controlled shadows, clean spacing and alignment
overhead.notes: Similar to bird’s-eye but can be closer and more intimate.

product_flat_lay.name: Product flat lay
product_flat_lay.prompt_fragment: flat-lay product shot photographed from directly above, clean arrangement, consistent spacing, true-to-color rendering, minimal shadows
product_flat_lay.notes: Use for garments or accessories laid on surface, not worn.

product_on_mannequin.name: Product on mannequin
product_on_mannequin.prompt_fragment: product photographed on a neutral mannequin, accurate drape and structure, clean background, true-to-color, no distracting styling
product_on_mannequin.notes: For e-commerce proof when talent is not needed.

profile_side.name: Profile side
profile_side.prompt_fragment: side profile shot, clear silhouette, clean background separation, controlled perspective, outfit lines readable
profile_side.notes: Excellent for outerwear, eyewear side fit, and silhouette emphasis.

three_quarter.name: Three quarter
three_quarter.prompt_fragment: three-quarter shot from knees up, slight angle to camera, dynamic but controlled fashion framing, silhouette readable
three_quarter.notes: One of the most used editorial framings for fashion.

two_shot.name: Two shot
two_shot.prompt_fragment: two-shot framing with two subjects, balanced composition, consistent lighting and perspective, clear outfit readability for both
two_shot.notes: Use only when you actually have multiple talents; otherwise avoid.

ultra_wide_establishing.name: Ultra wide establishing
ultra_wide_establishing.prompt_fragment: ultra-wide establishing shot with strong environment context, subject still clearly identifiable, straight lines controlled, cinematic scale
ultra_wide_establishing.notes: For narrative and location; ensure brand priorities remain readable.

waist_up.name: Waist up
waist_up.prompt_fragment: waist-up framing, face and upper garments prioritized, accessories readable, natural perspective, clean background separation
waist_up.notes: Efficient for social ads, tops, bags, eyewear.

grid_2x2.name: Grid 2x2
grid_2x2.prompt_fragment: single image contact sheet arranged in a 2x2 grid with consistent framing across all frames
grid_2x2.notes: Single image composed of four equally sized frames arranged in a 2x2 grid, commonly used as a contact sheet to compare poses, expressions, or variations with consistent lighting and camera setup.

grid_2x3.name: Grid 2x3
grid_2x3.prompt_fragment: single image contact sheet arranged in a 2x3 grid with uniform framing and lighting
grid_2x3.notes: Single image composed of six frames arranged in two columns and three rows, useful for showcasing sequential actions or multiple controlled variations while preserving visual consistency.

grid_3x3.name: Grid 3x3
grid_3x3.prompt_fragment: single image contact sheet arranged in a 3x3 grid showing controlled variations with consistent setup
grid_3x3.notes: Single image composed of nine frames arranged in a 3x3 grid, ideal for comprehensive character, pose, or expression studies with strict consistency.

horizontal_triptych.name: Horizontal triptych
horizontal_triptych.prompt_fragment: single image composed of three horizontal frames with consistent scale and lighting
horizontal_triptych.notes: Three frames arranged horizontally in a single image, often used in fashion editorials to show progression or subtle motion while maintaining continuity.

vertical_triptych.name: Vertical triptych
vertical_triptych.prompt_fragment: single image composed of three vertical frames with consistent framing and proportions
vertical_triptych.notes: Three frames stacked vertically, useful for mobile-first layouts and sequential storytelling with a strong vertical rhythm.
